description.value:
Trigger You attempt a saving throw against a spell or magical effect, but you haven't rolled yet.

You've spent your life learning to react with extreme wariness to all things mystical. You gain a +1 circumstance bonus to your saving throw against the triggering effect, which increases to a +2 circumstance bonus if the effect changes gravity or can cause you to fall @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.conditions.Item.Prone].
